title: Tool Relevance Rules v1
description: Configuration mapping host operations and file patterns to recommended ecosystem tools. Used to determine which tools are relevant-but-unused for a given session. Producer: lamella rule packages. Consumer: cortina session analysis.

rules.description: Ordered list of relevance rules. Earlier rules take precedence on conflict.

operation.description: Host tool operation this rule applies to.

file_pattern.description: Optional glob pattern. Rule applies only when the operation targets a matching file path.

command_pattern.description: Optional shell command prefix pattern. Rule applies only when the Bash operation matches this prefix (e.g., 'cargo *').

recommended_tools.description: Tools that should be used when this operation occurs.

reason.description: Why this tool is recommended for this operation.

severity.description: How strongly the tool usage is expected.

check_window.description: How far back in the session to check when determining unused status.
